case_title: MCKEE, CAROL J. vs. AMERICAN TASTING INSTITUTE INC. A CALIF. CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKEE, CAROL J. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN TASTING INSTITUTE INC. A CALIF. CORP.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN TASTING INSTITUTE INC. A CALIF. CORP.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN TASTING INSTITUTE INC. A CALIF. CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCKEE, CAROL J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN TASTING INSTITUTE INC. A CALIF. CORP. $4,034.72 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,117.72
